children.name: A wallet-first QR payment resolution engine on Nigeria's NIBSS NQR rails. Scan a QR or type a name@shappay address — the engine resolves the rail and settles instantly.

text.content: A wallet-first QR payment resolution engine on Nigeria's NIBSS NQR rails. Scan a QR or type a name@shappay address — the engine resolves the rail and settles instantly.
